title: PRESCHOOL PROMISE - 211info
text: EARLY LEARNING HUB OF CENTRAL OREGON PRESCHOOL PROMISE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps locate publicly funded preschools in family care, center, and school settings. Eligible students are matched to sites based on family preference and need. Setting options include days, hours of operation, transportation, primary language, bilingual programs, curriculum, and approach. 2362 Glacier Place Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: -Must be ages 3-4 before September 1st of the calendar year -Household income must be below 200% of FPL -Must be an Oregon resident -Families receiving SNAP do not need to provide additional income verification -Housing Adjustment: Eligibility Specialists may adjust a family’s gross income calculation when determining eligibility to account for excessive housing costs. This applies to families who do not meet income eligibility but spend more than 30% of their gross income on housing costs Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 693-5622 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 693-5622 Program Coordinator Zach Manley [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and, Jefferson Counties and, the Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs Services: Child Care Expense Assistance * Foster Children Child Care Expense Assistance * Preschool Age Children Preschool Referral Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY LEARNING HUB EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - UPSTART If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EARLY LEARNING HUB OF CENTRAL OREGON
